summary: Optimized the spatial coordinate calculation system. Developed a relative-scaling algorithm to ensure bounding box persistence across varying display resolutions and aspect ratios.
learnings: Coordinate normalization and spatial data integrity.

summary: Conducted research on Vision-Language Models (VLM) for zero-shot entity extraction. Analyzed LayoutLMv3 performance on the DocVQA dataset to evaluate potential backbone upgrades.
learnings: Evaluating Transformer-based backbones for document entity recognition.

summary: Performed comprehensive error analysis on the 'seiton-ai-ocr-v1' inference engine. Categorized OCR failure points by analyzing Character Error Rate (CER) and Word Error Rate (WER).
learnings: Systematic benchmarking and ML model performance profiling.

summary: Refactored the FastAPI gateway to support asynchronous document processing using BackgroundTasks, reducing initial request-response latency for multi-page uploads.
learnings: Scaling AI backends for high-concurrency workloads.

summary: Developed a specialized table reconstruction algorithm. Implemented proximity-based cell merging to accurately reconstruct tabular data from raw spatial coordinates.
learnings: Heuristic and ML-based table structure reconstruction.

summary: Optimized CUDA memory allocation during batch inference. Implemented a PyTorch-based cache-clearing mechanism to resolve OOM (Out of Memory) errors during high-resolution processing.
learnings: Managing GPU resource allocation in deep learning inference.

summary: Engineered the Markdown Export Module. Designed a schema-mapping engine that converts detected document entities into structured, LLM-ready Markdown text.
learnings: Transforming unstructured spatial data into semantic text formats.

summary: Integrated an interactive Coordinate-to-Image mapping layer. Developed the backend logic for visual validation, allowing real-time bounding box inspection in the staging environment.
learnings: Bridging ML metadata with frontend visualization systems.

summary: Executed end-to-end stress testing for the 'seiton-ai-ocr-v1' pipeline. Profiled system performance under sustained load to identify bottlenecks in image decoding and model inference.
learnings: Reliability engineering and performance profiling for AI services.

summary: Refined the paragraph clustering algorithm. Implemented dynamic spatial distance calculations to improve reading order accuracy in multi-column layouts.
learnings: Applying spatial clustering algorithms to document layout parsing.

summary: Automated the generation of API documentation via Swagger. Defined detailed Pydantic models to ensure strict data validation for the Document AI clone's REST endpoints.
learnings: Implementing self-documenting and type-safe API architectures.

summary: Optimized the image ingestion pipeline using ThreadPoolExecutor for concurrent page resizing and normalization, achieving a ~25% reduction in total turnaround time.
learnings: Optimizing IO-bound tasks in data-intensive AI pipelines.

summary: Conducted a technical walkthrough of the 'seiton-ai-ocr-v1' prototype. Demonstrated 92% accuracy on complex entity extraction tasks during the internal sprint review.
learnings: Communicating complex ML milestones to technical stakeholders.

summary: Updated the technical methodology for the Document AI research paper. Integrated comparative benchmarks between regional OCR engines and the 'seiton-ai-ocr-v1' baseline.
learnings: Translating engineering results into formalized academic documentation.

summary: Finalized the Path-Traceability logic for the inference engine. Implemented robust path handling using Pathlib to ensure cross-platform compatibility for data storage and retrieval.
learnings: Robust file system management and project data integrity.

summary: Evaluated a fine-tuned LayoutLM checkpoint for field-specific entity extraction. Analyzed the performance delta between standard OCR and entity-aware Transformer models.
learnings: Evaluating fine-tuned Transformer models for document understanding.

summary: Implemented a specialized data augmentation suite using Albumentations. Integrated elastic transforms and brightness jitter to improve model robustness against noisy document scans.
learnings: Enhancing model generalization through advanced data augmentation.

summary: Concluded the sprint by merging optimized OCR features into the production branch. Updated the LogicBrackets README with detailed deployment guides and tech-stack specifications.
learnings: Maintaining production-grade code quality and documentation standards.

summary: Optimized the Intersection over Union (IoU) thresholds for the Region Proposal Network (RPN). Implemented morphological post-processing to improve character connectivity in fragmented layouts.
learnings: Refining spatial segmentation accuracy in deep learning pipelines.

summary: Integrated a PyTorch-based Vision Transformer (ViT) backbone. Conducted ablation studies on feature fusion techniques to optimize structural recognition of tabular document data.
learnings: Utilizing self-attention mechanisms for long-range spatial dependencies.

summary: Refactored the core inference engine to support multi-stage asynchronous processing. Decoupled detection and recognition logic to maximize GPU throughput and validated via CER benchmarks.
learnings: Optimizing resource allocation for high-throughput AI inference.
